query:
SELECT UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente)) as nome_norm, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(empresa ORDER BY id) as empresas, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(cpfAgente,'') ORDER BY id SEPARATOR '|') as cpfs
FROM agentes
WHERE nomeAgente IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente))
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;

FROM agentes
WHERE nomeAgente IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente))
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
